title: Floating Clients
summaryBody: Reduce a sub-optimal method for client management. Ensure practices utilise the practice dashboard in the way in which we intend, embedding scalable growth driven by dashboard engagement. Reduce time spent by the Sales time trying to resolve the issue manually.
detailBody: Reduce a sub-optimal method for client management. Ensure practices utilise the practice dashboard in the way in which we intend, embedding scalable growth driven by dashboard engagement. Reduce time spent by the Sales time trying to resolve the issue manually.
